about.title: Who am I?
about.description: Creating “something” out of nothing — that’s what excites me about programming. I enjoy solving problems, building clean interfaces and continuously improving my skills as a frontend developer.
about.locationRemote: I am open to remote work.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.learningDescription: I am motivated to continuously improve my skills, implement innovative solutions and stay up to date with new technologies.

common.workProcess: How I have organised my work process

pokedex.description: A simple web application that uses the PokéAPI to display Pokémon data. Users can search for Pokémon and view relevant details in a clean interface.
pokedex.workProcess: The project was structured with reusable functions, separated logic and clear file organisation for HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
pokedex.learned: This project helped me practise planning, documenting and improving code step by step.

join.description: Join is a task management application inspired by the Kanban system. Users can create tasks, assign contacts and organize work across different boards.
join.workProcess: The project was structured into reusable components, clear JavaScript functions and separate areas for board logic, contacts and task handling.
join.groupWork: Working on Join helped me practise collaboration, task distribution, communication and merging different parts of the project.

elPolloLoco.description: El Pollo Loco is a 2D jump-and-run game built with object-oriented JavaScript. The player collects items, avoids enemies and fights the final boss.
elPolloLoco.workProcess: The game logic was structured into separate classes for the character, enemies, objects, the world and collision handling.
elPolloLoco.learned: This project helped me improve my understanding of object-oriented programming, animations, game loops and interactive browser-based applications.

contact.title: Contact me
contact.intro: I am interested in frontend development opportunities where I can create clean, responsive and user-friendly web interfaces. If you are looking for a motivated developer who enjoys solving problems and continuously improving, feel free to contact me.

It has an educational purpose and is not intended for extensive personal and business usage. As such, we cannot guarantee consistent availability, reliability, accuracy, or any other aspect of quality regarding this product.

legal.proprietaryText: Aside from the design owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, we, the listed students, retain all proprietary rights in Portfolio, including any associated copyrighted material, trademarks, and other proprietary information.
legal.useText: Portfolio is intended to be used for lawful purposes only, in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. Any use of Portfolio for illegal activities, or to harass, harm, threaten, or intimidate another person, is strictly prohibited. You are solely responsible for your interactions with other users of Portfolio.

In no event will we, the listed students, or Developer Akademie be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or exemplary damages, including but not limited to damages for loss of profits, goodwill, use, data, or other intangible losses, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages, arising out of or in connection with the use or performance of Portfolio.
